Stop paying for 5 different AI subscriptions. I was running Claude Pro + ChatGPT Plus + Gemini Advanced + a research tool + a coding assistant. That's $100-200/month and I was still copy-pasting between tabs. Perplexity Computer handles all of it in ONE session: → Deep reasoning when I need strategy decisions → Fast lightweight tasks that don't burn credits → Live web research with real cited sources → Image and video generation in the same chat → Code generation and deployment without leaving the window I run 5 businesses and this is the biggest workflow simplification I've made this year.

洞察与解读

  • 科技方向：AI 与大模型相关话题仍持续引发广泛讨论，关注落地场景与产品迭代。
  • 市场动态：宏观经济数据与政策预期是市场情绪的主要驱动力。
  • 建议持续追踪高热度话题，结合多来源信息做出判断。
